name: Capital Area Counseling
description_short: Capital Area Counseling is a free credit assistance provider based in Austin, Texas. Rated 4.2/5 with 33 Google reviews, reflecting strong customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Capital Area Counseling is a free credit assistance provider serving clients in Austin, Texas. Carrying a 4.2/5.0 Google rating from 33 reviews, Capital Area Counseling has an strong reputation among consumers in the Austin area looking to access free credit counseling and financial guidance.

Operating as a counselor, family counselor, marriage or relationship counselor, Capital Area Counseling provides a range of services for consumers seeking free credit assistance solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Non-profit and free credit assistance providers in Austin offer valuable resources for consumers who need help but may not be able to afford paid services. Capital Area Counseling provides an important community service, and consumers should verify the organization's non-profit status and HUD-approval where applicable. Free counseling sessions can be a good starting point before committing to paid credit repair or debt relief programs.

Consumers in the Austin, Texas area who are considering Capital Area Counseling should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any free credit assistance provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
